title: An Act authorizing the Massachusetts Teachers’ Retirement System to grant credible service to Sara Scibelli

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Ashe of Longmeadow, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Brian M. Ashe for legislation to authorize the Massachusetts Teachers’ Retirement System to grant credible service to Sara Scibelli.  Public Service.
